title: Vibrant Fog
description: Unique fog and sky colors for biomes
body:
# Vibrant Fog
Adds colorful and unique sky and fog colors for every biome!
## Screenshots Check out the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vibrant-fog/gallery) for more info on specific biomes ![Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uGXM132J/images/dc8e82126e5e2a5fca3dd2c93ccba460e51f70b8_350.webp) ![Meadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uGXM132J/images/c0aa768c00df87188db9969f13e752c61a431449_350.webp) ![Swamps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uGXM132J/images/407997493cce7088bedc3275d66b10dcd15b5536_350.webp) ![Warm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uGXM132J/images/eef3202ae121cf26a222114573269c26446d3994_350.webp) ![Desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uGXM132J/images/d332a9fc41fdbce8beb654965bfb16a32de2e39e_350.webp) ![Mesa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uGXM132J/images/d5ec02531d0dc47ee8746aa1fdd8f2b72917c7e3_350.webp) ![Cold Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uGXM132J/images/5ebdeeff72b2e5320866f06aaeccf65eb4ff7b5c_350.webp) ![Cold Snowy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uGXM132J/images/3ddaff1ac23215380b3472ce078bc3c8de572101_350.webp)
